data.description:
Zero importers in src/. conflict_resolver.py:10-12 defines its OWN ProvenanceLedger and calls this file a 'companion to the differ-level provenance_ledger' — that consumer is gone. Delete module + test_provenance_ledger.py; update the reference in test_conflict_resolver_echo_suppression.py and the conflict_resolver.py:12 comment.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Module + test_provenance_ledger.py deleted; echo-suppression test + conflict_resolver.py comment updated
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Delete test-locked orphan: provenance_ledger.py + its tests
